problem text: You find yourself on death row. The judge proposes a game: You have $50$ white marbles, $50$ black marbles, and $2$ empty containers available. You can allocate all $100$ marbles between the $2$ containers however you like. Afterward, you will be blindfolded and need to choose one container to draw a marble from. Drawing a white marble results in your freedom, whereas drawing a black marble results in immediate execution. What is your probability of staying alive if you employ the best strategy?
problem hint: If the containers are not evenly distributed, it implies that one container must have a probability greater than $0.5$ of drawing a white marble, while the other has a probability less than $0.5$. In the optimal scenario, one container offers a probability of $1$ of survival, while the other offers a $0.5$ probability, leading to a $75\%$ chance of survival.
